meta.title: Live from Latent Space
meta.description:
Hello, this is an album made for you using only sounds generated by Google Music LM, I hope you enjoy it.

The prompts i used:
70s boom bap slow hiphop beat
80s boom bap slow hiphop beat
90s boom bap slow hiphop beat
70s funk drum fill
70s funk live guitar fill
funk shout solo voice 
only bass fill slow 70s funk
